description: Agentic workflow to fetch BigEarthNet dataset in Switzerland, run a ResNet-32 classifier, and plot specific land cover classes on the map.
label: BigEarthNet Switzerland Workflow

participants.description: Fetches satellite images from the BigEarthNet dataset for a specific area of interest in Switzerland.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: fetch_bigearthnet_agent
config.description: Fetch BigEarthNet images in Switzerland for specified area.
config.system_message: Fetch images from the BigEarthNet dataset for Switzerland.

participants.description: Runs the ResNet-32 classifier on fetched satellite images.
participants.label: VisionAgent

config.name: run_classifier_agent
config.description: Classifies the fetched images using a ResNet-32 model.
config.system_message: Run the ResNet-32 classifier on the images obtained.

participants.description: Plots specified land cover classes on the map.
participants.label: MapAgent

config.name: plot_classes_agent
config.description: Plots the 'Vineyards' and 'Fruit trees and berry plantations' classes on the map.
config.system_message: Plot the specified land cover classes on the map.
